title: Pan Aroma Set Of 4 Pot Pourri Fragrance - Berries Fluffy Towels Vanilla Coconut Lavender
features: Fragrant Blend: Experience a delightful fusion of Berries, Vanilla, Coconut, and Lavender in this Potpourri Sachet
Long-Lasting Scent: Enjoy the fresh and inviting aroma for an extended period
Natural Ingredients: Crafted with real berries, fluffy towels, vanilla, coconut, and lavender for an authentic scent
Safety First: Keep away from heat sources and out of reach of children and pets. Do not ingest
Versatile Use: Place in drawers, closets, or cars to freshen up any space
description: Product description Indulge your senses with our Pan Aroma Set of 4 Pot Pourri Fragrance Sachets, a delightful blend of Berries, Fluffy Towels, Vanilla, Coconut, and Lavender. These air fresheners are designed to fill your space with a captivating, long-lasting aroma. Each sachet is carefully crafted to be a convenient and mess-free way to enjoy your favorite scents. Keep them out of reach of children and pets, and away from heat sources. Dispose of them properly after use. Enjoy the perfect balance of sweet and soothing notes that will transform your home into a cozy, inviting sanctuary. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not ingest. Dispose of properly after use.
